title: limnetis pungens
intro: Limnetis pungens, also known as the desert marigold or Fendler's desert marigold, is a perennial shrub that belongs to the family Asteraceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat digestive issues, skin irritations, and respiratory problems due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Limnetis pungens include reducing fever, alleviating colds and flu, and promoting wound healing. Herbal preparations of Limnetis pungens can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
